design_context: Mobile-first PWA logistics operations tool. Used outdoors in low light. Utility, not a marketing site.

rules.large_text: 20px+ for number plates, driver names, and departure times
rules.weight: Bold weight for number plates, driver names, and key figures
rules.contrast: High contrast, easily readable outdoors at dusk

color_chips.usage: Solid filled rounded squares, min 20x20px. Never as text labels alone.

spacing_and_layout.strategy: Mobile-first, single-column scrollable lists. No hamburger menus, no sidebars, no modals. Everything inline.
spacing_and_layout.tap_targets: Minimum 44px height on every interactive element (buttons, checkboxes, inputs)
spacing_and_layout.cards: White cards with solid borders or slight shadow to pop against the light gray background
spacing_and_layout.padding: Generous internal padding for readability (p-4 to p-6 inside cards)

status_pill.description: Full-width rounded pill at the top of each truck card.
status_pill.behavior: Color changes with status. Advances via tap (waiting -> loading -> departed -> arrived -> complete).

color_chip.description: Solid colored chips (min 20x20px, rounded-sm) to represent sellers. NEVER text labels alone.

buttons.primary: bg-[#1D6B5A] text-white min-h-[44px] rounded-md font-bold w-full

forms.description: Inline only. No modals. Inputs must have min-height of 44px. Clear focus states.

icons.usage: Functional only (e.g., checkmarks, copy link). Avoid decorative icons.

testing.requirement: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.

instructions_to_main_agent: DO NOT use Inter for fonts. Stick to Chivo and IBM Plex Sans from Google Fonts.
Build mobile-first views only. The UI should look like a native mobile app even on desktop.
Ensure all .js files (not .tsx) are used for React components.
Strictly adhere to the 44px minimum height for ALL interactive elements.
Do not use Shadcn Dialogs, Sheets, or Popovers. All UI must be inline and scrollable.
Implement real-time sync via polling logic in the React components.
Add data-testid attributes to all buttons, inputs, and status indicators.
Never display the 6 seller color chips as text alone; they must always render as solid color blocks.
